name_cn:
Suede [Small Pumpkin]
MIUMI^24FW Autumn/Winter Suede Collection Bowling Bag
The hottest element this autumn and winter must be suede! Softy padded is a reinterpretation of the classic bowling bag silhouette. The simple design highlights the bag's diverse functionality and practical concept. The new suede material maximizes the autumn/winter vibe, exuding a super high-end retro tone. Which MIUMI^ Autumn/Winter series is your pick?
